investigational_status_notice: Retatrutide remains investigational, has no approved product label, and is not approved for public use. This asset is evidence intelligence, not prescribing guidance.

outcomes.result_summary: Phase 2 randomised evidence reported substantial dose-dependent weight reduction through 48 weeks, with the highest-dose group reaching approximately 24% mean reduction.
Sponsor-reported phase 3 topline results described approximately 28% mean weight reduction at 80 weeks in the 12 mg arm.

outcomes.domain: Type 2 diabetes glycaemic and weight outcomes
outcomes.result_summary: Phase 2 and phase 3 randomised evidence supports reductions in HbA1c and body weight, with interpretation tied to population, dose group and background therapy.
Sponsor-reported TRIUMPH-4 results indicate improvement in weight and osteoarthritis pain; complete peer-reviewed interpretation remains required.
TRIUMPH-1 included an obstructive sleep apnoea basket study; outcome claims remain evidence-version controlled.
Phase 2a evidence supports liver-fat and metabolic outcome assessment; it does not establish an approved indication.
Definitive event-reduction evidence is not established; dedicated outcome trials are ongoing.
